prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GRAYDUCTTAPE-30FT Product Type: ADHESIVE_TAPES Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Gray Duct Tape 30ft Roll 2 Inch Wide Adhesive Tape Description: Repair, pack, wrap or bind items with the Universal Tool Duct Tape Roll.

This roll comes with 30 feet of high quality duct tape with an aggressive adhesive. The roll is about 2 inches thick, so you'll be able to cover a lot of ground. It comes in a classic gray color, and is constructed of 70 mesh/200um thick. Make sure to keep a few rolls of this super strong adhesive tape in your office, garage, workshop or kitchen for general maintenance. Search Terms: adhesives duct tape gear repair maintenance tools Features: - High Quality Duct Tape - Gray Color - Dimensions: 2" x 10 Yards (30 Feet) - 70 Mesh / 200um Thick - Aggressive High Quality Adhesive - Ideal for Wrapping, Sealing, Binding, Packing & General Maintenance === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool Gray Duct Tape 2 Inch x 30 Feet

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 30-ft 2 in Gray Duct Tape

anthropic.title_differentiation: 70 Mesh, 200Um Thick, Aggressive Adhesive, Repair, Sealing, Binding, Wrapping, Packing

openai.title_differentiation: Aggressive Adhesive, 70 Mesh, 200Um Thick, 30 Ft Roll, Wrapping, Sealing, Binding, Packing, Maintenance
